author: Marie-Laure Thuret
subject: v4.1.0-beta.5
body: # [4.1.0-beta.5](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/compare/v4.1.0-beta.4...v4.1.0-beta.5) (2017-08-08) ### Bug Fixes * **SSR:** clean SP before rendering agan (algolia/react-instantsearch#238) ([fd66264](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/commit/fd66264)) ### Features * **Breadcrumb:** add a new widget & connector (algolia/react-instantsearch#228) ([e5bd78c](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/commit/e5bd78c))
